likely_response.local: Pode pagar no caixa perto da entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NOO KEYE-shuh PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cashier near the entrance.
